name: Forval RealStraight Inc.
summary: Forval RealStraight Inc. provides real estate brokerage and office relocation support services in Japan. It also sells OA communication equipment. The company was formerly known as Fread Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Forval RealStraight Inc. in July 2009. Forval RealStraight Inc. was founded in 1995 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan. Forval RealStraight Inc. is a subsidiary of Forval Corporation.
